title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Dedicated Freight Corridor

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Dedicated Freight Corridor
jsonLd.description:
Dedicated Freight Corridor invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Fleet Manager at our Mysuru location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Dedicated Freight Corridor:
Dedicated Freight Corridor is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dedicated Freight Corridor!
